description: File-aware skill auto-routing: a PostToolUse hook injects a directive to load the relevant best-practice skill when you edit a matching file (SQL, components, tests, Dockerfiles), a SessionStart hook primes a repo-tailored skill index, and low-confidence content signals surface in a SessionEnd digest. Fail-open, once per signal per session.

dropped.reason: no Codex peer for this hook event
